TextView.android:text: Dining expenses up 24% this month. At current pace, food budget will be exhausted in 6 days.
Unused subscription detected. Cancel Spotify add-on to save Rs 499/month.
Entertainment spending is unusually high compared to last month.
Family food budget is 85% used (Rs 3,825/Rs 4,500). Consider capping dining out.
Netflix renewal scheduled in 3 days. Charged to Family Pot.
Entertainment spending unusually high vs. previous months.
